title: copernicia × vespertilionum
intro: Copernicia × vespertilionum, also known as the Vespertilion Palm, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Copernicia alba and Copernicia australis. The medicinal properties of the Vespertilion Palm include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce stress, improve skin health, and aid in the treatment of wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Copernicia × vespertilionum can be found in the form of essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
